home.tagline: Administrative intake and thoughtful professional matching—with a human coordinator in the loop.

intake.title: Administrative intake
intake.lede: Share preferences and support needs so a coordinator can suggest professionals. This is an administrative process—MindMesh does not diagnose and matching results are not clinical recommendations.
intake.demoNote: Demo only — use fictional information. Nothing is sent to a real backend or AI provider.

intakeReview.title: Review intake
intakeReview.lede: Clients will review and correct structured information extracted from free text before submission. This screen is a placeholder.
intakeReview.demoNote: Demo placeholder — extracted information must always remain editable. Matching results are administrative suggestions only.

coordinator.title: Coordinator dashboard
coordinator.lede: Coordinators will review administrative match suggestions and approve or override referrals. Approval UI is not implemented yet.
coordinator.demoNote: Demo placeholder — the professionals below are fictional. Suggestions are not clinical recommendations.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.lede: That route does not exist in this MindMesh demo.
